scene_input.scene_summary: ʿAddās arrives at the Prophet's house with a bunch of grapes.
scene_input.key_visual_action: ʿAddās holding a bunch of grapes and knocking on the door.

schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 100
schema_output.moral_lesson: The importance of hospitality and giving gifts

characters.name: ʿAddás

schema_output.narrative_text: ʿAddás arrives at the Prophet's house with a bunch of fresh grapes as a gift.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. Exterior of a modest 7th century Makkah home with unpainted mud-brick walls in warm earth tones and a packed-earth floor partly covered by a woven palm-fiber mat. Late afternoon golden sunlight casts warm rays across the room through an open wooden doorway. In the doorway stands a slender man seen from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a simple tunic and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, holding a bunch of grapes in one hand and about to knock on the door. On the other side of the doorway, the central figure seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, standing with one hand on the doorframe and a calm expression. Soft warm golden light, inviting and hospitable mood. Medium close shot at eye level. Warm sand, cream, and golden palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
